name: neural-memory
description: Reflex-based memory system for AI agents — stores experiences as interconnected neurons and recalls them through spreading activation, mimicking how the human brain works.
instructions: Neural Memory: persistent memory for AI agents. RECALL at session start (nmem_recall), SAVE after each task (nmem_remember with type+priority+tags), flush at session end (nmem_auto). Use causal language ('chose X over Y because Z'). For scratch notes use ephemeral=true. All tools support compact=true to save tokens.
